name: Kachumber Salad
servings: makes: this makes enough for 4–6 people as an accompaniment. you can easily double or triple the recipe
intro: This is a popular salad in many Indian restaurants. Sometimes it’s on the menu but often it’s simply used to garnish dishes. It makes a nice side dish as it doesn’t compete with the other dishes served. It is colourful and crisp, and really helps to bring a meal together.
method: Mix the onion, cucumber and tomatoes together in a large bowl. Add the oil, lemon juice, chopped coriander (cilantro), cumin seeds and some salt and pepper to taste. Place in the fridge for about 30 minutes before serving.
